title: Erasmus+ Anlaşması
content:
Erasmus+ Anlaşması

tıklayınız

.

The Department of Political Science and International Relations has signed a new Erasmus+ bilateral agreement with the Department of Political Science at the International Balkan University in Skopje (Macedonia). According to this new agreement--which update an already existing agreement--every year we can send and receive two BA students for one semester. The European Commission offer to students from Istanbul 29 Mayıs University a monthly grant of 300€ to study in Macedonia.

Görüntülenme:

1145
